headline: Akamai (AKAM): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q1 Earnings?
summary: What a time it’s been for Akamai. In the past six months alone, the company’s stock price has increased by a massive 45.5%, reaching $128.24 per share. This performance may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.

headline: Akamai Is Recognized in the 2026 Gartner® Peer Insights™ Voice of the Customer for Edge Distribution Platforms
summary: The Gartner® Peer Insights™ Customers’ Choice attribution is based on feedback and ratings from end-user professionals who have experience with the product or serviceCAMBRIDGE, Mass., July 09, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Akamai (NASDAQ: AKAM) has been named a Customers’ Choice in the 2026 Gartner Peer Insights Voice of the Customer for Edge Distribution Platforms.
